### To do!

- [ ] [original paper by Henon and Heiles](https://articles.adsabs.harvard.edu/pdf/1964AJ.....69...73H) @Henon1964
- [ ]

**yesterdays todo's:***

- [ ] investigation of 'How to implement?' and 'How to visiualize?'
- [ ] simple implementation of various and visualization 

---

### checking in

I feel that I should read about implementing the Héno & Heiles. 
I should also read their original paper.
